title: VortexStacker
description: Optimize your server with an all-in-one stacker plugin. Stack spawners, mobs, blocks, and XP orbs to reduce lag and improve performance, plus take full control of drops with an advanced built-in loot table editor.
body:
![VortexStackerDescription](https://vortexdevelopment.net/api/plugins/vortexstacker/images/4205957e-dae4-418a-83c7-8804eab9016b.png)
<details>
<summary>Text Description</summary>

# VortexStacker
Running a survival or skyblock server shouldn't mean dealing with laggy mob farms, cluttered ground items.

**Say goodbye to entity lag, TPS drops, and fragmented stacking solutions.** Introducing the ultimate all-in-one Stacking Plugin, built for performance, flexibility, and modern Minecraft servers.

_(More preview images can be found on the [Wiki](https://wiki.vortexdevelopment.net/projects/vortexstacker) page, contact support on our [Discord](https://dc.vortexdevelopment.net/) server)_

***

### **Why Choose VortexStacker?**
Our plugin consolidates mob stacking, item stacking, spawner stacking, and loot management into one highly optimized system. No more juggling multiple plugins with conflicting behaviors or outdated codebases. VortexStacker delivers a seamless, lag-free experience with powerful customization options right out of the box.

### **Compatibility & Performance**
Supported Versions: Paper (and compatible forks) 1.21.3+ only
Designed exclusively for the latest Minecraft API to deliver maximum performance and future-proof stability.

**Zero NMS** (Net Minecraft Server) Usage
Since the plugin uses no NMS, updates are smooth and consistent, your server can usually update versions without needing a plugin update.

### **Database Support**
Fully supports **MySQL** and **MariaDB** (recommended for best performance).
Local **H2** database works out of the box but is not advised for large servers due to limited scalability.

### **Configuration & Documentation**
Every configuration file is meticulously documented to ensure a smooth setup experience, even for beginners.
Whether you're configuring stack limits, loot tables, spawner holograms, or merge behavior, you'll find clear explanations for every option.

### **What's Included?**
* **Mob Stacking - Intelligent entity merging with attribute matching, custom name formats, and auto-translations.**
* **Item Stacking** - Ground items merge automatically into clean, formatted stacks.
* **Spawner Stacking** - Stack spawners with hologram displays, silk touch support, and crafting recipes.
* **Custom Loot Tables** - Full control over mob drops with 20+ drop conditions and in-game GUI editing.
* **Developer API** - Access managers for entities, items, spawners, and blocks with full event support.

### **Built Different**
VortexStacker isn't just another stacking plugin, it's a complete entity management solution designed from the ground up with modern server needs in mind. Whether you're running a small SMP or a massive skyblock network, VortexStacker scales with you.

*Stop fighting your plugins. Start running your server.*

</details>
